document.title: DR Console Software feel-DRCS User Manual / Installation Service Manual

sourceSummary.oneLine: Installation and user manual for IMFOU feel-DRCS ver.2 DR console software for human X-ray radiography use.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports installation, setup, operation, troubleshooting, and DICOM MWL text-file interface configuration for feel-DRCS DR console software.
keyPoints: feel-DRCS is described as DR console or DR control software that acquires images from DR detectors and provides DICOM services for PACS linkage.
The stated use is obtaining general X-ray images by radiological technologists and doctors in hospitals.
The manual identifies Version 2.1, Revision 007, dated 2018.09.20.
The compatible detector list in the source identifies H&abyz HAD1717M.
The software is a medical device and cannot be used alone; it must connect with an X-ray detector.

entities.name: IMFOU CO.,LTD.
entities.evidence: IMFOU CO.,LTD. #1105, Daerung PostTower7, 48, Digital-ro 33-gil, Guro-gu, Seoul, 08377. Korea.

entities.name: feel-DRCS
entities.evidence: feel-DRCS는 flat-panel 또는 CCD 등의 DR detector로부터 영상 획득 및 임상적용을 위한 빠른 속도의 영상처리, 그리고 PACS 연동을 위한 DICOM 서비스를 제공하는 DR console 또는 DR control software 입니다.

concepts.name: Digital radiography console software
concepts.evidence: feel-DRCS 는 imfoU 사의 Digital Radiography Control Software의 제품명 입니다.

concepts.name: Intended users
concepts.evidence: Feel-DRCS는 방사선사 및 의사들이 일반 X선 영상을 획득하기 위한 용도로 사용된다.

concepts.name: Medical device standalone limitation
concepts.evidence: This medical device can’t use alone. So this product need to connect with X-ray detector.

concepts.name: DICOM services
concepts.evidence: PACS 연동을 위한 DICOM 서비스를 제공하는 DR console 또는 DR control software 입니다.

concepts.name: DICOM MWL text-file interface
concepts.pageTarget: DICOM Modality Worklist Text File Interface
concepts.evidence: Appendix DICOM MWL interface by Text file

concepts.name: System requirements
concepts.evidence: Processor: Intel Core i3 이상(i5 이상 추천) RAM : 4GB RAM 이상(8GB 이상 추천) ... OS : Windows 7/8.1/10

evidence.claim: The document is for DR Console Software feel-DRCS ver.2 for human use.
evidence.evidenceText: DR Console Software User Manual (for HUMAN) feel-DRCS ver.2

evidence.claim: The manual version is 2.1 and revision is 007.
feel-DRCS is a DR console or DR control software providing image acquisition, image processing, and DICOM services for PACS linkage.
evidence.evidenceText: feel-DRCS는 flat-panel 또는 CCD 등의 DR detector로부터 영상 획득 및 임상적용을 위한 빠른 속도의 영상처리, 그리고 PACS 연동을 위한 DICOM 서비스를 제공하는 DR console 또는 DR control software 입니다.

evidence.claim: feel-DRCS is intended for radiological technologists and doctors to acquire general X-ray images.
evidence.evidenceText: Feel-DRCS는 방사선사 및 의사들이 일반 X선 영상을 획득하기 위한 용도로 사용된다.

evidence.claim: The software should only be installed by service engineers and used by radiological technologists and doctors.
evidence.evidenceText: 이 소프트웨어는 서비스 엔지니어에 의해서만 설치되고 방사선기사 및 의사에 의해서만 사용되어진다.

evidence.claim: The product is identified as a medical device and should be used as digital X-ray radiography console software at corresponding hospitals.
evidence.evidenceText: This product is a medical device, and it should only be used as digital X-ray radiography console software for X-ray radiography at corresponding hospitals.

evidence.claim: The product cannot be used alone and needs connection with an X-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: This medical device can’t use alone. So this product need to connect with X-ray detector.

evidence.claim: The compatible detector list includes H&abyz HAD1717M.
If a device other than compatible devices is changed, feel-DRCS cannot be operated.
evidence.evidenceText: If you change other device excepted with compatible devices, the feel-DRCS can’t be operated.

evidence.claim: The workstation OS requirement lists Windows 7, 8.1, and 10.
The appendix covers a DICOM MWL interface by text file.
evidence.evidenceText: Appendix DICOM MWL interface by Text file
evidence.pageTarget: DICOM Modality Worklist Text File Interface

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not explicitly stated in the source text; authoritySignal metadata indicates MFDS/domestic but the extracted document text does not name MFDS or KFDA as an issuing authority.
The source contains mixed title signals: User Manual, Installation Service Manual, for HUMAN, and for PIXX1717.
Some extracted text appears to be from a converted manual with omitted images and minor OCR or spelling artifacts such as Workist/Worklsit and Window/Windows.
